rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §31.0721, which governs review and release of open education resource instructional materials. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: open education resource instructional material may not be made available under this subchapter to students, teachers, educators, or other education professionals before being reviewed by the agency under Section 31.023
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns instructional material review, not property tax exemptions.
